title: Polar Gear Personalised A-Z Sticker Water Bottle with Straw 600ml – Official Merchandise Kids Reusable Non Spill BPA Free Tritan – Personalise - Ideal For School Nursery Sports Picnic - Navy
features: Official Polar Gear Bottle: Kids can personalise their bottle with their name! Includes 1 sheet of A-Z stickers. Ensure surface is clean and dry, then simply peel the stickers off the page and place on your new bottle. Part of our official Polar Gear merchandise. Matching lunch box availabl

Non Toxic & BPA Free:Our Official Polar Gear water bottles are hardwearing and made from recyclable and durable PP, 100% BPA free and great for everyday use at school, sports, after school clubs, days out and holidays.

Leakproof & Designed For Little Hands: Our lightweight bottle features a child-friendly leak proof flip-up spout and easy to carry loop - great for children to sip from on the go and is an ideal gift. Push the spout down to avoid leaks.

Ensure Your Child Stays Hydrated: Our 600ml Personalise water bottle fits most drinks holders for bikes and cars as well as standard backpack nets or pockets, so your kid's drink is always in arm's reach.
Easy To Clean: The bottle has a rigid internal straw which can easily be removed and the neck of the bottle is wide enough for grown-up hands for cleaning with a bottle brush after the school run.
Not suitable for hot or carbonated drinks. Rinse & dry before use. Hand wash only. Not suitable for children under 36 months as small parts may present a choking hazard.
description: Personalise your own bottle! Our 100% BPA free non-toxic water bottle has an easy-to-use flip-up straw to help children stay hydrated.This reusable bottle will help keep your child's thirst at bay during school, club activities or on trips out with the family. The easy to use flip-up drinking spout makes it simple for children to sip without spilling water. Simply push the spout down to avoid leaks. This 600ml bottle has a built in carry loop and fits most drinks holders as well as standard backpack nets or pockets, so your kid's drink is always within arm's reach. Our Polar Gear bottles are made of recyclable and durable Tritan plastic, with a rigid internal straw which can be detached whilst the screw top neck of the bottle is wide enough for cleaning with a bottle brush.Whether your kid is having water on a day trip to the park or at school, our bottles will save you buying drinks when out. Say no to single-use plastics and incorporate reusable water bottles into your family's sustainable lifestyle. Part of our official Polar Gear merchandise.Great for everyday use at school, sports, after school clubs, days out and holidays. Dimensions: Width: 8.5cm Depth: 6.5cm Height: 23.3cm, Weight: 100gPlease note:Easy to apply stickers, just ensure that then surface is clean and dry before applying the stickers. Once the stickers have been applied we recommend hand washing only to avoid the stickers peeling off.1. Handwash in warm soapy water, rinse and air dry. 2. Not suitable for hot drinks. 3. Not suitable for children under 36 months as small parts may present a choking hazard.4. Not recommended for hot liquids.For Best results ensure:1. The flip spout is correctly located and firmly in position when drinking.2. The spout of the bottle is firmly closed and secured when not in use.3. The lid of the bottle has been correctly secured to the base of the bottle. 4. When drinking, keep the bottle upright, rather than tipping it up like a regular sports bottle.
